metadata.description: Onfire MCP skills marketplace. Hosts the onfire-mcp-skills plugin: an orchestrator skill plus five atomic skills (one per Onfire MCP tool) for AI prospecting, identity resolution, contact enrichment, and prospecting schema management, and an account-research skill that generates full BDR briefs from Onfire MCP, Snowflake EDGAR filings, and Metabase signals.

plugins.name: onfire-mcp-skills
plugins.description: Skill tree for the Onfire MCP. Includes an orchestrator skill that routes user intent across five atomic skills (one per Onfire tool) covering identity resolution, AI prospecting, contact enrichment, and prospecting schema configuration, plus an account-research skill that generates full BDR briefs by combining Onfire MCP, Snowflake EDGAR 10-K filings, and Metabase intent signals.
